headline: Everest Group Canada Sale Prompts Ratings Review And Valuation Questions
summary: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) has agreed to sell its Canadian retail insurance business, Everest Insurance Company of Canada, to The Wawanesa Mutual Insurance Company. The transaction will significantly change Everest Group’s footprint in Canada and has triggered an AM Best ratings review of Everest Insurance Company of Canada with negative implications. The review reflects the loss of the entity’s role within Everest Group once the sale closes. For investors watching Everest Group at a share...
